variables.name: content_pool
variables.description: Available content pool in dictionary format with note_id as keys. Each content item contains the following fields: note_id (note ID), title (title), desc (content), time (timestamp indicating content publication time in milliseconds), user_id (publisher ID), nickname (publisher nickname), liked_count (like count), collected_count (collection count), comment_count (comment count), ip_location (IP geographic location), tags_list (tag list), comments (comment list).

variables.name: current_timestamp
variables.description: Current simulation time step. Initial time is set to the earliest note publication time.

variables.name: timestamp_duration
variables.description: Duration of each time step in milliseconds.

variables.name: current_notes
variables.description: Dictionary of current notes in dictionary format with note_id as keys. Each note item contains the following fields: note_id (note ID), title (title), desc (content), time (timestamp indicating content publication time in milliseconds), user_id (publisher ID), nickname (publisher nickname), liked_count (like count), collected_count (collection count), comment_count (comment count), ip_location (IP geographic location), tags_list (tag list), comments (comment list).

variables.name: mention_pool
variables.description: Dictionary of mention pool in dictionary format with comment_id as keys. Each mention item contains the following fields: comment_id (comment ID), note_id (note ID), comment_content (comment content), mentioner_id (mentioner ID), mentioner_nickname (mentioner nickname), mention_type (mention type).

variables.name: reference_csv_path
variables.description: The path to the reference CSV file.

variables.name: recommendations
variables.description: Dictionary of note content pushed by social network. The key is the note ID, the value is a dictionary containing note ID, title, content, publisher ID, publisher nickname, publication time, and other fields.

variables.name: last_login_timestamp
variables.description: The timestamp of the last login.

variables.name: login
variables.description: The flag of login. True(1), False(0), Not Set(-1)

variables.name: recommendations
variables.description: Dictionary of note content pushed by recommendation algorithm. The key is the note ID, the value is a dictionary containing note ID, title, content, publisher ID, publisher nickname, publication time, and other fields.
